overview.title: Open Catalog — Overview
overview.description: Open Catalog enables retailers to manage their store's product catalog on Rappi directly via API, without accessing the admin dashboard.

items.title: Products
items.text: Create, update and remove products from the store catalog on Rappi.

items.title: Categories
items.text: Organize products into categories for easier customer navigation.

items.title: Stores
items.text: Query and manage settings for stores linked to your partner account.

items.title: Inventory
items.text: Keep stock and prices updated for each product in each store.

sections.title: Base URL
sections.content:
All Catalog API requests use the prefix:

**Sandbox:** `https://microservices.dev.rappi.com/api/rocket-retailer/v1`

**Production:** `https://microservices.rappi.com/api/rocket-retailer/v1`

autenticacao.title: Authentication
autenticacao.description: The Open Catalog API uses the same OAuth 2.0 system as Open Orders.

sections.title: Same credentials
sections.content: Use the same `client_id` and `client_secret` as Open Orders. See the **Authentication** section in Open Orders for the complete token flow.

list-products.title: List Products
list-products.description: Returns all products in the specified store's catalog.

create-product.title: Create Product
create-product.description: Adds a new product to the store catalog.

update-product.title: Update Product
update-product.description: Updates an existing product in the catalog.

delete-product.title: Delete Product
delete-product.description: Removes a product from the store catalog.

sections.title: Irreversible action
sections.content: Deletion is permanent. Consider using `available: false` to temporarily hide the product.

list-categories.title: List Categories
list-categories.description: Returns all categories in the store catalog.

create-category.title: Create Category
create-category.description: Creates a new category in the store catalog.

list-stores.title: List Stores
list-stores.description: Returns all stores linked to the authenticated partner.
